meaning: conj.唯恐,以免,免得,(用于fear,be afraid之后,等于that)
examples: Prithee master thy tongue, lest we be all beaten till we die!
Boil the oil soiled by the coil in the toilet lest it spoils.
"That is not Michael," she said quickly, lest a judgment should fall on her.
Lest you think this is just fanciful conspiracy-theory stuff, consider how Groupon accounts for revenue.
You might not have fast-forwarded to another song either lest your tape get chewed up.
